_meta.note: First real regression pins for the conditional token-injection manuscript exemplar. The manuscript is fully tokenized; its quantitative claims are the deterministic count tokens rendered from manuscript/config.yaml (seed 431) through the real pipeline function src.manuscript_variables.generate_variables. Five load-bearing configuration/token-plan/QA/lexicon counts are pinned: the deterministic token-plan size (TOKEN_CHOICE_COUNT), the lexicon-size claim (LEXICON_CATEGORY_COUNT), the QA probe count (QUALITY_PROBE_COUNT), the slot-rule count that drives injection (SLOT_RULE_COUNT), and the enabled-visualization-flag count (CONFIGURED_FIELD_VISUALIZED_COUNT). Every value is re-derived from source (generate_variables / load_madlib_config / generate_token_plan), never hand-copied from the manuscript. No mocks: the real config loader and token planner run against the committed manuscript/config.yaml.

setup_token_choice_count.reason: Total number of deterministic token choices in the injection plan (one per expanded slot ordinal). This is the token-plan-size headline of the token-injection generator. Re-derived as len(generate_token_plan(config).choices), surfaced as generate_variables(root)['TOKEN_CHOICE_COUNT']. Cross-checked: equals sum(slot.count for slot in config.slots) == 40.
setup_token_choice_count.script: cd projects/templates/template_madlib && PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -c "from manuscript_variables import generate_variables; from pathlib import Path; print(generate_variables(Path('.')) ['TOKEN_CHOICE_COUNT'])"

setup_lexicon_category_count.reason: Number of lexicon categories declared in manuscript/config.yaml (madlib.lexicon). This is the lexicon-size claim reported in the configuration counts. Re-derived as len(config.lexicon), surfaced as generate_variables(root)['LEXICON_CATEGORY_COUNT'].
setup_lexicon_category_count.script: cd projects/templates/template_madlib && PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -c "from config import load_madlib_config; from pathlib import Path; print(len(load_madlib_config(Path('.')).lexicon))"

evaluation_quality_probe_count.reason: Number of QA quality probes declared in manuscript/config.yaml (madlib.quality_probes); these populate the Quality Probes table in 06_evaluation.md and the configuration counts in 05_experimental_setup.md. Re-derived as len(config.quality_probes), surfaced as generate_variables(root)['QUALITY_PROBE_COUNT'].
evaluation_quality_probe_count.script: cd projects/templates/template_madlib && PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -c "from config import load_madlib_config; from pathlib import Path; print(len(load_madlib_config(Path('.')).quality_probes))"

setup_slot_rule_count.reason: Number of slot rules declared in manuscript/config.yaml (madlib.slots); each slot is expanded deterministically into its ordinal token choices. Re-derived as len(config.slots), surfaced as generate_variables(root)['SLOT_RULE_COUNT'].
setup_slot_rule_count.script: cd projects/templates/template_madlib && PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -c "from config import load_madlib_config; from pathlib import Path; print(len(load_madlib_config(Path('.')).slots))"

setup_configured_field_visualized_count.reason: Number of enabled visualization flags in the configured-field audit; reported as the 'Enabled visualization flags' configuration count in 05_experimental_setup.md. Re-derived via configured_field_counts over configured_field_inventory, surfaced as generate_variables(root)['CONFIGURED_FIELD_VISUALIZED_COUNT'].
setup_configured_field_visualized_count.script: cd projects/templates/template_madlib && PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -c "from manuscript_variables import generate_variables; from pathlib import Path; print(generate_variables(Path('.')) ['CONFIGURED_FIELD_VISUALIZED_COUNT'])"

evaluation_quality_probe_count.manuscript_section: manuscript/06_evaluation.md / Quality Probes (count in 05_experimental_setup.md / Configuration Counts)
